name: @knewbeing/vitepress-plugin-blogs
description: Monorepo for VitePress blog plugins: utilities and auto-sidebar/TOC plugin.

scripts.build: pnpm --filter @knewbeing/utils build && pnpm --filter @knewbeing/vitepress-plugin-autosidebar-toc build && pnpm --filter @knewbeing/vitepress-plugin-page-properties build
